2009.text: We're a cutting-edge technology company, constantly taking on new challenges in the worlds of milliseconds and terabytes. We need help from people who like to move fast, tackle the big stuff, and have an immediate impact. Sound like you?
2009.heading: Hello. Facebook is hiring.

2010.text: We're a cutting-edge technology company, constantly taking on new challenges in the worlds of milliseconds and terabytes. We need help from people who like to move fast, tackle the big stuff, and have an immediate impact. Sound like you?
2010.heading: Hello. Facebook is hiring.

2010.text: and Perks We've got it good! At our Palo Alto headquarters, we also offer free breakfast, lunch and dinner at our Cafe. Whether you're looking for healthy salads, or hearty world cuisine from Belize, India, etc., or just a couple slices of pizza, Chef Josef and his team of culinary geniuses in Palo Alto make it happen every day. Life at Facebook Innovation is paramount No matter what part of Faceb
2010.heading: Platform & Product Marketing

2011.text: Our employees build and create technology that fundamentally changes how hundreds of millions of people around the world connect and share. Come work with us.
2011.heading: Hello. Facebook is hiring.

2011.text: Innovate and make friends. No matter what part of Facebook you join, you'll be building something big and new. We welcome pioneers. In fact, we insist on them. Learn more about our culture. Work well. At our Palo Alto headquarters, we also offer free breakfast, lunch and dinner at our Cafe. Learn more about our benefits.

2012.text: Innovate and make friends. No matter what part of Facebook you join, you'll be building something big and new. We welcome pioneers. In fact, we insist on them. Learn more about our culture. Work well. At our Menlo Park headquarters, we also offer free breakfast, lunch and dinner at our Cafe. Learn more about our benefits.

2015.text: Connecting the world takes every one of us Move fast Connecting the world happens in real time. Our teams are small and nimble. We work quickly and collaboratively to build smarter, more meaningful solutions on a global scale. Be bold We’re determined to build a better, more connected world for everyone. From engineers to designers and marketers, we empower the people who work at Facebook to make

2025.text: Every day, we redefine and build a future that’s more open, accessible, and focused on human connection. Explore our featured roles and join our mission to build the future of human connection.
2025.heading: Join us in connecting the world.

2025.text: Every day, we redefine and build a future that’s more open, accessible, and focused on human connection.
2025.heading: Join us in connecting the world.

2025.text: Come work alongside passionate individuals who are excited to learn and love what they do.
2025.heading: Collaborate and connect to drive new ideas

2025.text: Teamwork drives innovation, cultivates human connection and supports constant learning. Whatever role each of us plays — engineer, analyst, strategist, designer — our best work comes through collaboration and combining our collective skills. Build the next generation of AI openly and responsibly Meta is all in on building the future of AI with Llama, our open-source collection of models. Llama tur
2025.heading: Our best ideas happen together

2025.heading: Our best ideas happen together

2026.text: We’ve integrated our state-of-the-art open source language model with Meta AI, our intelligent assistant, for enhanced scalability and performance. Meta Llama significantly elevates various capabilities, such as code generation, reasoning and content translation. We’ve integrated our state-of-the-art open source language model with Meta AI, our intelligent assistant, for enhanced scalability and p
2026.heading: We build awesome things

2026.text: From Oakley Meta Vanguard to Oakley Meta HTSN, this is the next evolution of AI glasses. Oakley and Meta have joined forces to bring AI glasses to sports and everyday lifestyles, combining Oakley's eye-catching style with Meta's innovative wearable and AI technology. Built for life on the field, trail, or track, with everyday use cases, Oakley Meta is here to evolve sport and enhance performance.
2026.heading: We build awesome things

2026.text: From Oakley Meta Vanguard to Oakley Meta HTSN, this is the next evolution of AI glasses. Oakley and Meta have joined forces to bring AI glasses to sports and everyday lifestyles, combining Oakley's eye-catching style with Meta's innovative wearable and AI technology. Built for life on the field, trail, or track, with everyday use cases, Oakley Meta is here to evolve sport and enhance performance.
2026.heading: We build awesome things

2026.text: Meta Ray-Ban Display and Meta Neural Band are redefining the way people connect. This breakthrough tech allows people to answer messages, capture high-quality audio and video, and use Meta AI on a private in-lens display with intuitive, on-wrist controls — proving what's possible when you push the limits of AI in wearables. Meta Ray-Ban Display and Meta Neural Band are redefining the way people co
2026.heading: We build awesome things

2026.text: Muse Spark powers Meta AI with natively multimodal reasoning, visual chain of thought and multi-agent orchestration. It can reason through complex questions in science, math and health, and see and understand what you're looking at — not just read what you type. 2026.heading: We build awesome things
